purpose: Phase implementation-group verdicts generated after grouped implementation batches. Use this as a bounded group-repair queue before the normal phase coverage gate.

repairPolicy.blockedMeans: explicit blocker/fallback decision exists; do not loop on this group before phase gate
repairPolicy.completeMeans: linked source/platform authority rows have enough behavior, parity, endpoint, and evidence data

groups.title: Source behavior: data/repository

requiredBehaviors: LoginRepositoryImpl persists a single boolean login flag under DataStore file `user_login_state_pref` and flips it in `toggleLoginState()`.
LoginRepositoryImpl exposes `loginState` as a `Flow<Boolean>` that SplashViewModel reads to determine the startup route before clearing loading state.
Source review of LoginRepositoryImpl found only DataStore-backed login preference reads and writes; it does not request permissions or call protected platform APIs.
LoginRepositoryImpl stores login configuration in a preference-backed DataStore file and toggles the persisted `user_login_state` boolean.
acceptanceEvidence: Closed critical/high features must record sourceBehavior, targetBehavior, parityLevel, targetEndpoints, and verificationEvidence.
Build pass alone is not per-feature verification.
Referenced target tests need to be covered by the latest accepted test gate or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: critical/high behavior cannot close on build pass alone

requiredBehaviors: Source review of MainActivity found splash setup and composition startup only; it does not inspect intents, deeplinks, bundles, or cross-screen parameters.
MainActivity.onCreate installs splash gating and composes the app only after startup state has chosen the correct start destination.
MainActivity hosts the shell by composing `SetupNavigation(startDestination = screen)` once SplashViewModel resolves the startup route.
MainActivity observes SplashViewModel state to keep the splash visible while loading and to compose navigation with the resolved `startDestination` state.
Source review of MainActivity found no runtime permission request or protected API access.
MainActivity installs the Android splash screen, keeps it visible while startup state is loading, and enters the app with the resolved first route.

requiredBehaviors: Source review of Navigation.kt found no image-viewing, bitmap, EXIF, zoom, or preview behavior; the file only declares routes and shell chrome.

Navigation.kt declares the route catalog plus shell-owned bottom bar and floating cart action, visible only on home/history while the shared list state is at the top. Bottom-bar tab commands avoid duplicating destinations.
Navigation.kt derives shell visibility from observable navigation back-stack state and a shared LazyListState first-visible-item index.
Source review of Navigation.kt found only route declarations and shell chrome logic; it does not request permissions or access protected APIs.
Source review of Screen.kt found only static route identifiers and `withArgs`; it does not request permissions or call protected APIs.
